patch.value: GH-586: graph audit severity and code summaries mix finding and affected-item units

GitHub issue #586 reports that pm graph audit findings_by_severity counts findings while findings_by_code sums affected items, making one response envelope internally ambiguous for agents and analytics.
Audit summary fields use explicitly named consistent units or expose both finding_count and affected_item_count with contract docs and regression coverage.

value.author: codex-sdk-vcs-20260718
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-18: exact all-status title search returned zero; AND search across graph audit severity/count terms found no canonical issue. Created from https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/586 and linked to active graph primitives pm-ju83 plus governance parent pm-6x7o; left open and unclaimed because this PR does not implement it.
